(Endodontics) Root Canal Treatment Specialist Home About us Our Treatments Implants Crowns & Bridges Cosmetic Dentistry Root Canal Treatment Dentures Orthodontics Children Dentistry Gum Treatment Oral Surgery Our Work Locate Us Contact Us Best Dental Clinic & Dentist in Ashok Vihar Arora's Dental Clinic in Ashok Vihar,is managed by Professor  Dr. Aman Arora,( Prosthodontist & Implantologist), Dr. Dimple Arora (Cosmetic Dentist & Oro-dental surgeon) and Dr.Hrithik Arora(Endodontist- Root Canal Treatment Specialist). With extensive knowledge and proficiency in various dental procedures, Dr. Aman Arora offers a wide range of treatments such as dental implants, crowns and bridges, full mouth rehabilitation, and comfortable dentures including flexible and high-impact unbreakable dentures and immediate tooth replacement after extraction. Additionally, his teaching experience and position as the head of the Department of Prosthodontics in a dental institute highlight his expertise and dedication to the field. Dr. Dimple Arora specializes in cosmetic dentistry, providing services like everlasting tooth-colored Fillings, Smile Makeover, Teeth Whitening, Teeth Extraction, Gum treatment, Children's dentistry. Her skills and expertise complement the comprehensive dental services offered at Arora's Dental Clinic. Dr.Hrithik Arora is an Endodontist and specializes in single visit advanced Root Canal Treatment procedures saving badly broken down and infected teeth. Retreatment of failed RCT adds to his expertise. The clinic offers Dental Braces Treatment done by Orthodontist who is a certified Invisalign specialist. Dr. Aman Arora's commitment to advancing dental knowledge is evident through his published articles in national and international dental journals, as well as his active involvement in dental research and article reviews. He holds lifetime memberships in various prestigious dental societies, including the Indian Prosthodontic Society, Academy of Oral Implantology, and Indian Dental Association. Arora's Dental Clinic prides itself on providing authentic and affordable dental services. With a focus on High precision digital dentistry, guaranteed treatments, and a high success rate, Arora's Dental Clinic has established itself as a trusted and well-established dental practice in Ashok Vihar in North Delhi and nearby areas like Shalimar Bagh and Model Town. Arora's Dental Clinic in Ashok Vihar is renowned for offering comprehensive dental treatments across all specialties. The Dental Specialists at this Dental Clinic In Ashok Vihar strive to stay up-to-date with the latest advancements in dental technology, ensuring that the patients receive high-quality precision dentistry with a high success rate. Located centrally in North Delhi, its very convenient for patients residing in nearby areas like Keshav Puram, Shastri Nagar, Kamla Nagar, Civil Lines and Pitampura. WHY CHOOSE US? We are committed to delivering high-quality precision Digital dentistry going into minute detailing by working under magnification. The treatments are performed by experienced senior dentists in the field of Endodontics, Orthodontics, Periodontics, Dental Implantology, Oral and Maxilofacial Surgery, and Pediatric Dentistry. We prioritize minimal waiting time for our patients as our services are provided by appointment system only. Staff is well-trained to help our dental specialists with efficiency and professionalism. Same day appointments and primary emergency dental care services are provided. We utilize state of the art technology, equipments, and materials sourced from renowned manufacturers worldwide. Dental treatment done here are longlasting and charges are affordable and value for money for our top-notch specialized services. Our clinic offers convenient on-site vehicle parking. The ground floor entrance ensures easy accessibility for all especially the elderly. Orthodontics Braces Treatment by Orthodontist is done to align and correct crooked teeth and Smile Improvement by… Children Dentistry Involves Fillings, Milk teeth extractions, cavity prevention, root canals, Space Maintainers, Habit… Gum Treatment Receeding gums, Inflamed Bleeding Gums, Loose Teeth are treated by Scaling and Flap surgeries… Oral Surgery Involves Extractions of broken down teeth, Impacted Wisdom teeth, Tooth Abscess, Jaw bone grafting… Frequently Asked Questions(FAQs) What are charges for Root Canal Treatment ? Root canal treatment charges range between INR 5000-6000 depending on condition of tooth, skill of the dentist and technology used. How much Dental Implant Treatment costs ? Single tooth replacement by Dental Implant costs around INR 25,000-35,000 depending on the brand of Implant, surgical situation and skill of the Implant Surgeon. What are charges for Teeth Capping? A good Porcelain fused to metal Crown costs INR 5000-6000 where as a Full Ceramic Zirconia crown costs INR 10,000 -12000. A Prosthodontist is a dental specialist trained to do Teeth Capping Treatment. How is Smile Makeover Treatment done ? Smile Makover can be done by Cosmetic Dental Treatment procedures like Teeth Whitening for Yellow Teeth, Crowns for broken down severly decayed teeth, Teeth Gap Closures by direct and indirect Veneers, Braces Treatment for crooked malaligned teeth. Is Teeth Cleaning harmful? Not at all. Its a misconception. Plaque if not removed by tooth brushing converts to hard tarter and calculus deposits which weaken the gums bone and teeth as they have millions of bacteria. These deposits are removed by special Ultrasonic Scalers without damaging your tooth structure hence making your Gums and Teeth stronger.
